description: Send a message to the agent and print the response

options.name: --model
options.description: Set the session model before sending the message

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Stream agent responses, tool calls, and events live

options.name: --new-session
options.description: Create a fresh active session for this command

options.name: --chain
options.description: Active chain id for chat/session context

options.name: --public-key
options.description: Wallet address so the agent knows your wallet

description: List available apps
Show the current app

List supported chains
List local sessions with metadata
Start a fresh local/backend session and make it active
Resume a local session
Delete a local session file
Show full conversation history with tool results
List pending and signed transactions
Batch-simulate pending transactions atomically (e.g. approve then swap)

args.name: tx-id
args.description: One or more pending tx ids

description: Sign and submit a pending transaction

args.name: tx-id
args.description: One or more pending tx ids

options.name: --rpc-url
options.description: Override RPC URL for this signing call

options.name: --public-key
options.description: Wallet address; must match the signer

description: List configured secrets for the active session
Add a secret to the active session (NAME=value)
Clear all secrets for the active session
Show current session state
